Earn rewards when you resell your plae shoes

Clean and thank your used shoes
Sell your shoes on Kidizen
Cash for the sale + PLAE rewards points

PLAE is an official member of the Kidizen REWEAR Collective, supporting the creation and reuse of quality, long lasting products that last well beyond the use of just one family.

The price shown here is the average resale price range with Kidizen's resell program — after shipping and fees.

Please refer to our size conversion charts if you have any questions about your foot length and corresponding size in U.S., European or U.K. sizing. Shoes fit true to size. Got more questions about finding the right fit? Check out our kid shoe sizing page.

US Mens US Womens Euro sizes UK sizes JP sizes (cm) 4.5 6 36 3.5 22.5 5 6.5 37 4 23 5.5 7 37.5 4.5 23.5 6 7.5 38 5 24 6.5 8 38.5 5.5 24.5 7 8.5 39 6 25 7.5 9 40 6.5 25.5 8 9.5 40.5 7 26 8.5 10 41 7.5 26.5 9 10.5 42 8 27 9.5 11 42.5 8.5 27.5 10 11.5 43 9 28 10.5 12 44 9.5 28.5 11 12.5 44.5 10 29 11.5 13 45 10.5 29.5 12 13.5 46 11 30 13 14.5 47 12 31 14 15.5 48.5 13 32

sizing - clothing

Tee Shirt Sizing Chart

Size Length in Length cm Chest Width in Chest Width cm Waist Width in Waist Width cm Youth SM (8) 20 "⅝ 52.4 cm 13 ¼" 33.6 cm n/a n/a Youth MED (10) 21 ¾" 55.2 cm 16 ¼" 41.3 cm n/a n/a Youth LG (12) 22 ⅞" 58.1 cm 17 ¼" 43.8 cm n/a n/a Women's S 24" 61 cm 33" 83.8 cm 34.5" 87.3 cm Women's MED 25" 63.5 cm 35" 88.9 cm 36.5" 92.7 cm Women's LG 26" 66 cm 39" 99 cm 40.5" 102.9 cm Women's XL 27" 68.6 cm 43" 109 cm 44.5" 113 cm Men's S 27.5" 69.8 cm 36.5" 92.7 cm 36.5" 92.7 cm Men's MED 28.5" 72.4 cm 39.5" 100.3 cm 39.5" 100.3 cm Men's LG 29.5" 74.9 cm 42.5" 108 cm 42.5" 108 cm Men's XL 30.5" 77.5 cm 45.5" 115.6 cm 45.5" 115.6 cm

Tee length is measured straight down from high point center of neck to bottom edge of garment.

Tee Chest Width is measured across the chest 1" below the bottom of the arm hole of the sleeve.

Tee Waist Width is measured across the very bottom of the shirt, at the hem.

sizing chart | PLAE

Shoe sizing

Please refer to our size conversion charts if you have any questions about your foot length and corresponding size in U.S., European or U.K. sizing. Shoes fit true to size. Got more questions about finding the right fit? Check out our kid shoe sizing page.

Adult Shoe Size Conversions

US Mens US Womens Euro sizes UK sizes JP sizes (cm) 4.5 6 36 3.5 22.5 5 6.5 37 4 23 5.5 7 37.5 4.5 23.5 6 7.5 38 5 24 6.5 8 38.5 5.5 24.5 7 8.5 39 6 25 7.5 9 40 6.5 25.5 8 9.5 40.5 7 26 8.5 10 41 7.5 26.5 9 10.5 42 8 27 9.5 11 42.5 8.5 27.5 10 11.5 43 9 28 10.5 12 44 9.5 28.5 11 12.5 44.5 10 29 11.5 13 45 10.5 29.5 12 13.5 46 11 30 13 14.5 47 12 31 14 15.5 48.5 13 32
Style Fit analysis Size recommendation Abra Runs true to size Order current size Bulter Runs small Order ½ size up Crosby Runs true to size Order current size Ecols Runs small Order ½ size up Larkin Runs wide Order ½ size down Mulberry Runs small Order ½ size up Prospect Runs small Order ½ size up Sun Runs true to size Order current size Thai-Ha Runs true to size Order size up for slipper fit OR true size if wearing as shoes

Kids Shoe Size Conversions

Download PLAE fit kit

US Kids Euro sizes UK sizes JP sizes (CM) Inches
(approx. foot length) 5 21 4 13.3 4 ¾" 5.5 21.5 4.5 13.5 5" 6 22 5 14 5 ⅛" 6.5 22.5 5.5 14.3 5 ¼" 7 23 6 14.5 5 ½" 7.5 23.5 6.5 14.8 5 ⅝" 8 24 7 15 5 ¾" 8.5 24.5 7.5 15.3 6" 9 25 8 15.5 6 ⅛" 9.5 26 8.5 16 6 ¼" 10 27 9 16.5 6 ½" 10.5 27.5 9.5 16.8 6 ⅝" 11 28 10 17 6 ¾" 11.5 28.5 10.5 17.3 7" 12 29 11 17.5 7 ⅛" 12.5 30 11.5 18 7 ¼" 13 31 12 18.5 7 ½" 13.5 31.5 12.5 18.8 7 ⅝" 1 32 13 19 7 ¾" 1.5 32.5 13.5 19.5 8" 2 33 1 20 8 ⅛" 2.5 34 1.5 20.5 8 ¼" 3 34.5 2 21 8 ½" 3.5 35 2.5 21.5 8 ⅝" 4 35.5 3 22 8 ¾" 4.5 36 3.5 22.5 9"

Tab Sizing Chart

Tab size Shoe size Tab length (in) Tab length (mm) Small 6-9 3 ½" 90 mm Medium 9.5-12.5 4" 100 mm Large 13-3 4 ⅓" 110 mm Extra-Large 3.5-4.5, high instep, orthotic 5" 125 mm

Tee Shirt Sizing Chart

Size Length in Length cm Chest Width in Chest Width cm Waist Width in Waist Width cm Youth SM (8) 20 ⅝" 52.4 cm 13 ¼" 33.6 cm n/a n/a Youth MED (10) 21 ¾" 55.2 cm 16 ¼" 41.3 cm n/a n/a Youth LG (12) 22 ⅞" 58.1 cm 17 ¼" 43.8 cm n/a n/a Women's S 24" 61 cm 33" 83.8 cm 34.5" 87.3 cm Women's MED 25" 63.5 cm 35" 88.9 cm 36.5" 92.7 cm Women's LG 26" 66 cm 39" 99 cm 40.5" 102.9 cm Women's XL 27" 68.6 cm 43" 109 cm 44.5" 113 cm Men's S 27.5" 69.8 cm 36.5" 92.7 cm 36.5" 92.7 cm Men's MED 28.5" 72.4 cm 39.5" 100.3 cm 39.5" 100.3 cm Men's LG 29.5" 74.9 cm 42.5" 108 cm 42.5" 108 cm Men's XL 30.5" 77.5 cm 45.5" 115.6 cm 45.5" 115.6 cm

Tee length is measured straight down from high point center of neck to bottom edge of garment.

Tee Chest Width is measured across the chest 1" below the bottom of the arm hole of the sleeve.

Tee Waist Width is measured across the very bottom of the shirt, at the hem.

Tee Shirt Sizing Chart

Size Length in Length cm Chest Width in Chest Width cm Waist Width in Waist Width cm Youth SM (8) 20 ⅝" 52.4 cm 13 ¼" 33.6 cm n/a n/a Youth MED (10) 21 ¾" 55.2 cm 16 ¼" 41.3 cm n/a n/a Youth LG (12) 22 ⅞" 58.1 cm 17 ¼" 43.8 cm n/a n/a Women's S 24" 61 cm 33" 83.8 cm 34.5" 87.3 cm Women's MED 25" 63.5 cm 35" 88.9 cm 36.5" 92.7 cm Women's LG 26" 66 cm 39" 99 cm 40.5" 102.9 cm Women's XL 27" 68.6 cm 43" 109 cm 44.5" 113 cm Men's S 27.5" 69.8 cm 36.5" 92.7 cm 36.5" 92.7 cm Men's MED 28.5" 72.4 cm 39.5" 100.3 cm 39.5" 100.3 cm Men's LG 29.5" 74.9 cm 42.5" 108 cm 42.5" 108 cm Men's XL 30.5" 77.5 cm 45.5" 115.6 cm 45.5" 115.6 cm

Tee length is measured straight down from high point center of neck to bottom edge of garment.

Tee Chest Width is measured across the chest 1" below the bottom of the arm hole of the sleeve.

Tee Waist Width is measured across the very bottom of the shirt, at the hem.
